meaning: n.(一般为每周出版概述并分析时事的)新闻杂志
examples: This article is about a newsmagazine.
On top of that, I like to read a newsmagazine each week.
The international newsmagazine time features the findings of wrr2000in its international earth day special issue.
The problem is in manufacturing and producing a weekly newsmagazine, and that has to be solved.
Last week, the newsmagazine drew nearly 8 million viewers in the slot, a respectable Leno lead-in on an otherwise little-watched night.
